title: The BOS-TMC Dataset: DFT Properties of 159k Experimentally Characterized Transition Metal Complexes Spanning Multiple Charge and Spin States
summary: We present the Boston Open-Shell Transition Metal Complex (BOS-TMC) dataset, a set of density functional theory (DFT) properties for 159k experimentally characterized mononuclear transition metal complexes (TMCs) in multiple spin states with a range of formal charges derived from the Cambridge Structural Database (CSD). To curate this set, we carried out an iterative procedure to confidently assign overall TMC charge. From this information, we then obtained properties in up to three spin states, i.e., low-, intermediate-, and high-spin for 3d metals and low- and intermediate-spin for 4d and 5d metals, depending on compatibility with the metal electron configuration, for a total of 343.8k TMC/spin combinations. At odds with prior sets, we preserved experimental heavy-atom coordinates in these structures during optimization. We report all properties using PBE0/def2-TZVP single-point energies on these structures. We introduce a scheme for computing metal-spin-dependent atomization energies, which we report for each TMC. Alongside electronic energies, we report up to seven additional properties including: HOMO, LUMO, HOMO-LUMO gap, atomic partial charges, dipole moments, atomization energies, and spin-splitting energies for a total of over 2.9M TMC-associated properties. For a representative subset of over 10k complexes chosen based on size, we evaluate the sensitivity of computed properties to exchange-correlation (xc) functional choice from a set of twelve xcs spanning rungs of "Jacob's ladder", highlighting hotspots of TMC space that have the greatest uncertainty. In comparison to prior transition-metal datasets, BOS-TMC is both larger and more diverse in terms of charge and spin configurations and, as a result, more diverse in its range of properties. This dataset is expected to provide a high-fidelity foundation for machine-learning model development, DFT benchmarking, and exploration.

AI.tldr: 研究者构建了BOS-TMC数据集，包含159k个实验表征的单核过渡金属配合物的DFT性质，涵盖多种自旋态和电荷态，总计343.8k个配合物/自旋组合，提供了超过290万条性质数据。
AI.motivation: 现有过渡金属配合物数据集在电荷、自旋构型和性质多样性方面有限，需要更大、更多样化的高质量数据集来支持机器学习模型开发、DFT基准测试和探索研究。
AI.method: 从剑桥结构数据库(CSD)提取实验表征的单核过渡金属配合物，通过迭代程序确定配合物总电荷，在保留实验重原子坐标的情况下进行优化，使用PBE0/def2-TZVP计算单点能，并引入金属自旋依赖的原子化能计算方案。
AI.result: 构建了包含159k个配合物、343.8k个配合物/自旋组合的数据集，提供了电子能、HOMO、LUMO、能隙、原子部分电荷、偶极矩、原子化能和自旋分裂能等超过290万条性质数据，并评估了12种交换相关泛函对性质计算的影响。
AI.conclusion: BOS-TMC数据集在规模、电荷和自旋构型多样性方面优于现有数据集，为机器学习模型开发、DFT基准测试和过渡金属配合物探索提供了高质量的基础数据。

title: Crossing Seam Blockade
summary: Electronic degeneracies and near-degeneracies including conical intersections and avoided crossings, typically accompanied by strong vibronic couplings and nonadiabatic transitions, play fundamental roles in photochemical, photophysical and photobiological processes. However, its implications on excited-state chemical reactivities are not fully understood. In this theoretical study, we report a surprising phenomena that an open reaction channel can be \emph{completely} blocked by a crossing seam in the molecular configuration space. Specifically, by numerically exact ab initio nonadiabatic full quantum geometrical molecular dynamics simulations, we show that the singlet fission channel in the hydrogen chain H$_4$, previously identified as a minimal model for singlet fission, is blocked due to electronic quantum geometry. We provide a chemically intuitive picture to understand this effect. Our results not only reveal a new mechanism for controlling photochemical reactions, but may also elucidate the mechanism of singlet fission.

AI.tldr: 电子简并和近简并（如圆锥交叉和避免交叉）通常伴随强振动耦合和非绝热跃迁，在光化学过程中起重要作用。本研究发现反应通道可被构型空间中的交叉缝完全阻断，以H4氢链的单线态裂解为例，揭示了电子量子几何如何阻断反应通道。
AI.motivation: 电子简并和近简并（包括圆锥交叉和避免交叉）在光化学、光物理和光生物过程中起基础作用，但它们对激发态化学反应性的影响尚未完全理解。本研究旨在探索电子量子几何如何影响反应通道。
AI.method: 采用数值精确的从头算非绝热全量子几何分子动力学模拟，以H4氢链作为单线态裂解的最小模型，研究反应通道被阻断的现象。
AI.result: 研究发现H4氢链中的单线态裂解通道被构型空间中的交叉缝完全阻断，这是由电子量子几何效应导致的。研究提供了化学直观的图像来解释这一效应。
AI.conclusion: 研究不仅揭示了控制光化学反应的新机制，还可能阐明单线态裂解的机理，表明电子量子几何可以完全阻断反应通道，为光化学控制提供了新思路。

title: From Full Dynamic to Pure Static: A Family of $GW$-Based Approximations
summary: We introduce a systematic hierarchy of one-body Green's function methods derived from the $GW$ approximation, constructed by progressively reducing the dynamical content of the self-energy. Starting from the fully dynamical Dyson formulation, we generate a family of approximations that interpolates between the standard $GW$ approximation to purely static effective single-particle Hamiltonians. This framework enables a controlled investigation of the role of dynamical effects and particle-hole coupling in the description of ionization potentials. Within this unified formalism, the hole and particle branches can be selectively decoupled through downfolding strategies into reduced one-particle spaces. By benchmarking the different members of this hierarchy on molecular ionization energies, we assess their accuracy, numerical robustness, and algorithmic complexity. We demonstrate that consistently derived partially static schemes can yield reliable quasiparticle energies while significantly simplifying the underlying eigenvalue problem. We further introduce a novel static Hermitian self-energy obtained as the static limit of this hierarchy. Despite its conceptually distinct origin, it produces results remarkably close to those of qs$GW$, thereby providing an alternative static route toward partial self-consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从GW近似出发的系统性单粒子格林函数方法层次结构，通过逐步减少自能的动态内容，构建了从完全动态Dyson方程到纯静态有效单粒子哈密顿量的近似方法家族。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于系统性地探索自能动态效应和粒子-空穴耦合在描述电离势中的作用，提供一种可控的方法来评估不同近似方案的准确性、数值鲁棒性和算法复杂性。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）从完全动态的Dyson方程出发，逐步减少自能的动态内容；2）通过降维策略选择性地解耦空穴和粒子分支；3）构建部分静态方案简化本征值问题；4）引入新的静态厄米自能作为该层次结构的静态极限。
AI.result: 结果表明：1）一致推导的部分静态方案能够产生可靠的准粒子能量，同时显著简化本征值问题；2）新引入的静态厄米自能尽管概念起源不同，但产生的结果与qsGW非常接近；3）该框架为部分自洽性提供了替代的静态路径。
AI.conclusion: 结论是提出的系统性层次结构能够有效评估不同近似方法的性能，部分静态方案在保持精度的同时简化计算，新的静态自能为GW计算提供了替代的静态路径，有助于平衡计算精度和效率。

title: Comparative high-pressure study on rare-earth entropy fluorite-type oxides
summary: We report a comparative high-pressure study of two fluorite-type rare-earth oxides with increasing configurational entropy, (CePr)O$_{2-δ}$ and (CePrLa)O$_{2-δ}$. Synchrotron-based powder X-ray diffraction and Raman spectroscopy were carried out up to 30 GPa and 20 GPa, respectively. Both compounds retain the cubic fluorite structure throughout the pressure range explored, although an anomaly is observed between 9-16 GPa, characterized by a compressibility plateau and changes in vibrational modes. This behavior is attributed to local lattice distortions and a progressive bond angle bending rather than abrupt phase transitions. In (CePrLa)O$_{2-δ}$, the onset of amorphization is observed above 22 GPa, highlighting its reduced structural stability. The bulk modulus of both systems shows a slight decrease after the onset of the anomaly, suggesting subtle lattice softening. Raman spectroscopy reveals suppression of the F$_{2g}$ mode intensity with increasing cationic disorder, and under compression, partial reordering is evidenced by an increase in the RE-O mode intensity. Our results highlight the complex interplay between configurational entropy, cation size, and pressure in determining the structural stability and vibrational properties of rare-earth high-entropy oxides and provide insight into the mechanisms governing their resilience and local disorder under extreme conditions.

AI.tldr: 高熵稀土氧化物(CePr)O₂-δ和(CePrLa)O₂-δ在高压下保持萤石结构，但在9-16GPa出现异常行为，表现为压缩平台和振动模式变化，而非明显相变。三组分体系在22GPa以上出现非晶化，显示结构稳定性降低。
AI.motivation: 研究高熵稀土氧化物在极端压力条件下的结构稳定性和振动性质，探索构型熵、阳离子尺寸和压力之间的复杂相互作用，了解这些材料在极端条件下的抗压机制和局部无序性。
AI.method: 使用同步辐射粉末X射线衍射（最高30GPa）和拉曼光谱（最高20GPa）对两种不同构型熵的萤石型稀土氧化物(CePr)O₂-δ和(CePrLa)O₂-δ进行高压研究。
AI.result: 两种化合物在整个压力范围内保持立方萤石结构，但在9-16GPa出现异常，表现为压缩平台和振动模式变化。三组分体系在22GPa以上出现非晶化。体模量在异常开始后轻微下降，显示晶格软化。拉曼光谱显示F₂g模式强度随阳离子无序增加而抑制，压缩下部分重排通过RE-O模式强度增加得到证实。
AI.conclusion: 高熵稀土氧化物在高压下表现出复杂的结构响应，异常行为源于局部晶格畸变和渐进键角弯曲而非明显相变。构型熵增加会降低结构稳定性，导致非晶化。研究揭示了构型熵、阳离子尺寸和压力在决定稀土高熵氧化物结构稳定性和振动性质中的相互作用。

title: Granular Superconductivity in La$_{2}$PrNi$_{2}$O$_{7-δ}$ Thin Films
summary: Superconductivity realized in bilayer nickelate thin films enables direct spectroscopic and transport studies at ambient pressure. However, a persistent two-step resistive transition remains a major barrier to achieving optimal superconducting properties. Here, we show that the two-step transition in La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ thin films originates from the granular nature of superconductivity, specifically, the coexistence of two distinct superconducting grain phases coupled by a Josephson junction network. A secondary, lower-temperature transition appears in the $R(T)$ curve, even when residual resistance becomes vanishingly small near 30 K. This two-step behavior significantly lowers the zero-resistance transition temperature, $T_{c, zero}$$\approx$ 10 K, and limits advanced spectroscopic studies. Our findings reveal the microscopic mechanism underlying the two-step transition in thin films and underscore the need for improved oxygen homogeneity to achieve bulk superconductivity in this system.

AI.tldr: 双层镍酸盐薄膜中的超导性存在两步电阻转变问题，研究发现这源于超导的颗粒性质，即两种不同超导晶粒相通过约瑟夫森结网络共存，导致零电阻转变温度降低。
AI.motivation: 双层镍酸盐薄膜中的超导性可以在常压下进行光谱和输运研究，但持续的两步电阻转变阻碍了获得最佳超导性能，需要揭示其微观机制。
AI.method: 通过研究La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_{7-δ}$薄膜的电阻转变行为，分析其两步转变特征，特别是即使在30K附近剩余电阻变得极小时仍出现的次级低温转变。
AI.result: 发现两步转变源于超导的颗粒性质，即两种不同的超导晶粒相通过约瑟夫森结网络共存，这导致零电阻转变温度显著降低至约10K。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了薄膜中两步转变的微观机制，强调需要改善氧均匀性才能在该系统中实现体超导性。

title: CATAPULT: A CUDA-Accelerated Timestepper for Alpha Particles Using Local Tricubics
summary: We introduce a CUDA-Accelerated Timestepper for Alpha Particles Using Local Tricubics (CATAPULT) for use in Monte Carlo calculations of alpha particle confinement in stellarators. Our GPU implementation is significantly faster than existing parallelized CPU implementations, and handles both equilibrium magnetic fields and Shear Alfven Waves. We test our implementation on several example stellarators to exhibit both the speed and correctness of our code. The source code is included in the firm3d Python package.

AI.tldr: CATAPULT：用于仿星器中α粒子约束蒙特卡洛计算的GPU加速时间步进器，比现有CPU并行实现快得多
AI.motivation: 需要更快速的方法来计算仿星器中α粒子的约束，现有CPU实现速度较慢，无法有效处理平衡磁场和剪切阿尔芬波
AI.method: 开发了基于GPU加速的时间步进器，使用局部三次插值方法，能够处理平衡磁场和剪切阿尔芬波，在firm3d Python包中实现
AI.result: GPU实现显著快于现有的并行化CPU实现，在多个仿星器示例中验证了代码的速度和正确性
AI.conclusion: CATAPULT为仿星器中α粒子约束的蒙特卡洛计算提供了高效的GPU加速解决方案，代码已开源可用

title: Quasicrystal Architected Nanomechanical Resonators via Data-Driven Design
summary: From butterfly wings to remnants of nuclear detonation, aperiodic order repeatedly emerges in nature, often exhibiting reduced sensitivity to boundaries and symmetry constraints. Inspired by this principle, a paradigm shift is introduced in nanomechanical resonator design from periodic to aperiodic structures, focusing on a special class: quasicrystals (QCs). Although soft clamping enabled by phononic stopbands has become a central strategy for achieving high-$Q_m$ nanomechanical resonators, its practical realization has been largely confined to periodic phononic crystals, where band structure engineering is well established. The potential of aperiodic architectures, however, has remained largely unexplored, owing to their intrinsic complexity and the lack of systematic approaches to identifying and exploiting stopband behavior. Here we demonstrate that soft clamping can be realized in quasicrystal architectures and that high-$Q_m$ nanomechanical resonators can be systematically achieved through a data-driven design framework. As a representative demonstration, the 12-fold QC-based resonator exhibits a quality factor $Q_m \sim 10^7$ and an effective mass of sub-nanograms at MHz frequencies, corresponding to an exceptional force sensitivity of $26.4$~aN/$\sqrt{\text{Hz}}$ compared to previous 2D phononic crystals. These results establish QCs as a robust platform for next-generation nanomechanical resonators and open a new design regime beyond periodic order.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于准晶结构的纳米机械谐振器设计新范式，通过数据驱动框架实现了软夹持技术，获得了高达10^7的品质因子和亚纳克有效质量，展示了准晶在下一代纳米机械谐振器中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 自然界中广泛存在的非周期有序结构（如准晶）具有对边界和对称性约束不敏感的特性。虽然软夹持技术已成为实现高品质因子纳米机械谐振器的核心策略，但现有研究主要局限于周期性声子晶体，非周期结构的潜力尚未被充分探索，主要因其内在复杂性和缺乏系统设计方法。
AI.method: 提出从周期性结构向非周期结构的设计范式转变，专注于准晶结构。开发了数据驱动的设计框架，系统识别和利用准晶中的声子带隙行为，实现了软夹持技术在准晶架构中的实际应用。
AI.result: 12重准晶谐振器在MHz频率下实现了品质因子Q_m ~ 10^7和亚纳克有效质量，对应的力灵敏度达到26.4 aN/√Hz，优于之前的二维声子晶体谐振器。
AI.conclusion: 准晶结构为下一代纳米机械谐振器提供了稳健平台，开启了超越周期有序的新设计领域，为非周期结构在纳米机械系统中的应用开辟了新途径。

title: Score Shocks: The Burgers Equation Structure of Diffusion Generative Models
comment: 41 pages, 7 figures. Introduces a Burgers equation formulation of diffusion model score dynamics and a local binary-boundary theorem for speciation
summary: We analyze the score field of a diffusion generative model through a Burgers-type evolution law. For VE diffusion, the heat-evolved data density implies that the score obeys viscous Burgers in one dimension and the corresponding irrotational vector Burgers system in $\R^d$, giving a PDE view of \emph{speciation transitions} as the sharpening of inter-mode interfaces. For any binary decomposition of the noised density into two positive heat solutions, the score separates into a smooth background and a universal $\tanh$ interfacial term determined by the component log-ratio; near a regular binary mode boundary this yields a normal criterion for speciation. In symmetric binary Gaussian mixtures, the criterion recovers the critical diffusion time detected by the midpoint derivative of the score and agrees with the spectral criterion of Biroli, Bonnaire, de~Bortoli, and Mézard (2024). After subtracting the background drift, the inter-mode layer has a local Burgers $\tanh$ profile, which becomes global in the symmetric Gaussian case with width $σ_τ^2/a$. We also quantify exponential amplification of score errors across this layer, show that Burgers dynamics preserves irrotationality, and use a change of variables to reduce the VP-SDE to the VE case, yielding a closed-form VP speciation time. Gaussian-mixture formulas are verified to machine precision, and the local theorem is checked numerically on a quartic double-well.

AI.tldr: 论文通过Burgers型演化定律分析扩散生成模型的分数场，揭示了VE扩散中分数场遵循粘性Burgers方程，为物种形成转变提供了PDE视角，并建立了二元模式边界的临界标准。
AI.motivation: 理解扩散生成模型中分数场的演化规律，特别是物种形成转变（speciation transitions）的数学机制，为模式分离和界面形成提供理论框架。
AI.method: 使用Burgers型演化定律分析VE扩散的分数场，将分数分解为平滑背景和tanh界面项，建立二元模式边界的正常标准，并通过变量变换将VP-SDE简化为VE情况。
AI.result: 发现VE扩散的分数场遵循粘性Burgers方程，在对称高斯混合中恢复临界扩散时间，量化了分数误差在界面层的指数放大，并给出了VP物种形成时间的闭式解。
AI.conclusion: 扩散生成模型的分数场演化可以用Burgers方程描述，为物种形成转变提供了统一的PDE视角，建立了模式边界形成的数学标准，并验证了理论在具体模型中的精确性。

title: K$_2$Co$_2$(TeO$_{3}$)$_{3}$ $\cdot$ 2.5 H$_2$O : A mineral-inspired pseudo-honeycomb cobalt dimer antiferromagnet
comment: Main text (21 pages, 5 figures, 1 table); Supplementary information (27 pages, 8 figures, 18 tables)
summary: In recent years, magnetically-frustrated triangular and honeycomb lattice cobaltates have seen extensive study in the pursuit of a quantum spin liquid (QSL) state in a real material. In this work, we describe the hydroflux synthesis of K$_2$Co$_2$(TeO$_{3}$)$_{3}$ $\cdot$ 2.5 H$_2$O (KCoTOH), a novel zemannite-type antiferromagnet (AFM) possessing structural elements of both triangular dimer and honeycomb structural motifs. Bulk magnetometry and specific heat data support the onset of long-range AFM order below $T_\text{N}$ = 7.6(1) K, with neutron diffraction and muon spin relaxation ($μ$SR) measurements placing the majority of the ordered moment within the pseudo-honeycomb plane. We resolve three unique oscillation frequencies from the zero-field $μ$SR spectra, additionally suggesting a remarkably low level of structural disorder in as-grown KCoTOH crystals. Whereas interactions between dimerized chains of Co$^{2+}$ cations are typically observed to be negligible or ferromagnetic in nature, the largely planar ordering motif observed in KCoTOH is instead stabilized by net antiferromagnetic interactions through bridging tellurite groups. This work highlights the potential of hydroflux synthesis methods in the stabilization of magnetic materials possessing novel and potentially more frustrated lattice geometries.

AI.tldr: 通过水热合成制备新型钴酸盐K₂Co₂(TeO₃)₃·2.5H₂O，该材料具有三角二聚体和蜂窝结构特征，在7.6K以下呈现长程反铁磁有序，磁矩主要位于伪蜂窝平面内。
AI.motivation: 研究磁性受挫的三角和蜂窝晶格钴酸盐，探索真实材料中的量子自旋液体态。通过水热合成方法稳定具有新颖晶格几何结构的磁性材料。
AI.method: 采用水热合成法制备KCoTOH晶体；通过体磁化率和比热测量确定磁有序温度；利用中子衍射和μ子自旋弛豫技术分析磁结构和有序参数；通过零场μSR谱解析振荡频率评估结构无序程度。
AI.result: KCoTOH在7.6K以下呈现长程反铁磁有序；中子衍射和μSR显示磁矩主要位于伪蜂窝平面内；零场μSR谱解析出三个独特的振荡频率，表明晶体结构无序度极低；通过桥连碲酸盐基团的反铁磁相互作用稳定平面有序结构。
AI.conclusion: 水热合成方法能够稳定具有新颖晶格几何结构的磁性材料；KCoTOH中观察到的平面反铁磁有序由桥连碲酸盐基团的反铁磁相互作用稳定，而非通常的二聚化链间相互作用；该工作展示了水热合成在探索更受挫晶格几何结构方面的潜力。

title: Stability of Supported Pd-based Ethanol Oxidation Reaction Electrocatalysts in Alkaline Media
summary: This study evaluates the dissolution of the supported electrocatalysts Pd/C, PdSn/C, PdNb/C, and PdFe3O4/C during ethanol oxidation reaction for ADLFC applications. A scanning flow cell (SFC) coupled to an inductively coupled mass spectrometry (online ICP-MS) is used to assess the dissolution stability in a broad potential window. Accelerated stress tests with and without ethanol are developed using a rotating disk electrode (RDE) with dissolution products analysis by ex-situ ICP-MS. Potential profiles simulating those experienced by the catalyst during regular fuel cell operation were used. Sn and Fe catalysts demonstrate improved activity and stability compared with the material with Pd alone. For these reasons, PdSn/C and PdFe3O4/C are suitable for ADLFC applications. Severe Nb dissolution destabilizes Pd, increasing its leaching. This work demonstrates that while additional metals and oxides can improve the alcohol oxidation kinetics of Pd, these additives' dissolution stability must already be considered at the catalyst design stage.

AI.tldr: 评估Pd基电催化剂在乙醇氧化反应中的溶解稳定性，发现PdSn/C和PdFe3O4/C在活性和稳定性方面优于纯Pd/C，而PdNb/C因Nb严重溶解导致Pd稳定性下降。
AI.motivation: 研究Pd基电催化剂在乙醇氧化反应中的溶解稳定性，为碱性直接乙醇燃料电池（ADLFC）应用筛选合适的催化剂材料，强调在催化剂设计阶段就需要考虑添加剂的溶解稳定性。
AI.method: 使用扫描流通池（SFC）耦合在线ICP-MS在宽电位窗口评估溶解稳定性；开发旋转圆盘电极（RDE）加速应力测试（有/无乙醇），通过离位ICP-MS分析溶解产物；采用模拟实际燃料电池操作的电位分布。
AI.result: Sn和Fe催化剂相比纯Pd表现出改善的活性和稳定性，PdSn/C和PdFe3O4/C适合ADLFC应用；Nb严重溶解会破坏Pd稳定性，增加Pd浸出；添加剂虽能改善Pd的醇氧化动力学，但其溶解稳定性必须在设计阶段考虑。
AI.conclusion: PdSn/C和PdFe3O4/C是ADLFC应用的合适催化剂，而PdNb/C因Nb溶解问题不适合；催化剂设计中必须同时考虑活性和添加剂的溶解稳定性。

title: Theory-Guided Discovery of Pressure-Induced Transitions in Fast-Ion Conductor BaSnF4
summary: Fast-ion conductors such as BaSnF4 are of significant interest for next-generation solid-state battery technologies due to their high ionic conductivity and chemical stability. However, the behaviour of these materials under extreme conditions remains poorly understood, despite the relevance of pressure-induced modifications for tuning functional properties. In this study, we combine density functional theory (DFT) calculations with high-pressure experiments to investigate the structural evolution of BaSnF4 up to 40 GPa. DFT predicts two pressure-induced phase transitions: from the ambient-pressure tetragonal P4/nmm phase to a monoclinic P21/m-I structure at 10 GPa, and subsequently to a denser monoclinic P21/m-II phase at 32 GPa. The first transition is experimentally confirmed via angle-dispersive X-ray diffraction, Raman spectroscopy, and electrical resistivity measurements, all performed at ambient temperature. The second transition is supported by distinct changes in high-pressure Raman modes and resistivity behaviour, consistent with a further structural reorganization. These findings not only clarify the high-pressure phase diagram of BaSnF4, but also shed light on the potential for pressure-tuned ionic transport in fluorostannate-based solid electrolytes.

AI.tldr: BaSnF4在高压下经历两个相变：10GPa时从四方相变为单斜P21/m-I相，32GPa时变为更致密的单斜P21/m-II相，通过DFT计算和高压实验证实。
AI.motivation: BaSnF4作为快离子导体在固态电池中具有重要应用价值，但其在极端条件下的行为尚不清楚，而压力诱导的相变对调控功能性质具有重要意义。
AI.method: 结合密度泛函理论（DFT）计算和高压实验，包括角分散X射线衍射、拉曼光谱和电阻率测量，在室温下研究BaSnF4在40GPa内的结构演化。
AI.result: DFT预测了两个压力诱导相变：10GPa时从四方P4/nmm相变为单斜P21/m-I相，32GPa时变为更致密的单斜P21/m-II相。第一个相变被实验证实，第二个相变通过拉曼模式和电阻率变化得到支持。
AI.conclusion: 研究阐明了BaSnF4的高压相图，揭示了压力调控氟锡酸盐基固态电解质中离子传输的潜力，为固态电池材料设计提供了新见解。

title: Spectral solution of axisymmetric magnetization problems for thin superconducting shells
summary: Existing numerical methods for modeling magnetization in thin type-II superconducting films have mostly been developed for flat films. This work introduces an efficient spectral method for axisymmetric magnetization problems involving non-flat films. The method is based on the integral thin-shell current-density formulation of the problem, employs Chebyshev polynomial expansions for spatial discretization, and uses the method of lines for time integration. It applies to both open and closed axisymmetric shells and is so accurate that the solutions obtained can serve as benchmarks for numerical methods for general, not necessarily axisymmetric, thin-shell magnetization problems. As one of the examples, we consider magnetic shielding by a superconducting sphere.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于轴对称非平面薄膜磁化问题的高效谱方法，基于薄壳电流密度积分公式，采用切比雪夫多项式展开和线法时间积分，适用于开放和闭合轴对称壳层。
AI.motivation: 现有数值方法主要针对平面薄膜的磁化建模，缺乏处理非平面薄膜的有效方法，特别是轴对称结构的磁化问题。
AI.method: 基于薄壳电流密度积分公式，采用切比雪夫多项式进行空间离散化，使用线法进行时间积分，适用于开放和闭合轴对称壳层。
AI.result: 该方法精度极高，获得的解可作为一般薄壳磁化问题数值方法的基准，并以超导球体磁屏蔽为例验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为轴对称非平面薄膜磁化问题提供了高效准确的数值解决方案，可作为更一般薄壳磁化问题数值方法的基准。

title: Reinforcement learning with reputation-based adaptive exploration promotes the evolution of cooperation
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning serves as an effective tool for studying strategy adaptation in evolutionary games. Although prior work has integrated Q-learning with reputation mechanisms to promote cooperation, most existing algorithms adopt fixed exploration rates and overlook the influence of social context on exploratory behavior. In practice, individuals may adjust their willingness to explore based on their reputation and perceived social standing. To address this, we propose a Q-learning model that couples exploration rates with local reputation differences and incorporates asymmetric, state-dependent reputation updates. Our results show that each mechanism independently promotes cooperation, and their combination yields a reinforcing effect. The joint mechanism enhances cooperation by making ``high reputation--low exploration, low reputation--high exploration'', while adjusting reputation updates to amplify cooperative gains at low status and defection penalties at high status. This study thus offers insights into how social evaluation can shape learning behavior in complex environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种将探索率与局部声誉差异耦合的Q学习模型，结合非对称、状态依赖的声誉更新机制，有效促进多智能体进化博弈中的合作行为。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体强化学习算法大多采用固定探索率，忽略了社会情境对探索行为的影响。实践中，个体会根据自身声誉和社会地位调整探索意愿，需要更符合现实社会互动的学习模型。
AI.method: 提出新型Q学习模型：1) 将探索率与局部声誉差异耦合；2) 引入非对称、状态依赖的声誉更新机制。通过"高声誉-低探索，低声誉-高探索"的机制设计，并根据状态调整声誉更新以放大合作收益和背叛惩罚。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：1) 每个机制（探索率耦合、声誉更新）都能独立促进合作；2) 两种机制结合产生协同增强效应；3) 联合机制通过声誉-探索的负相关关系，以及状态依赖的声誉调整，显著提升了合作水平。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了社会评价如何塑造复杂环境中的学习行为，为理解声誉机制与探索策略的相互作用提供了新见解，有助于设计更符合社会现实的智能体学习算法。

title: Classification of magnon thermal Hall systems based on U(1) to non-Abelian gauge fields
summary: Magnon thermal Hall effect in insulating magnets is the manifestation of Berry curvature in magnon bands, which is formulated using the emergent gauge fields that act on magnons as a fictitious magnetic field. In ferromagnets, it is commonly accepted as the outcome of U(1) gauge fields generated by Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions and spin textures, but this mechanism is often suppressed by symmetry-enforced cancellations in many lattice geometries, known as a no-go rule. As a result, antiferromagnetic insulators have long been considered as unfavorable platforms for the effect. We show that antiferromagnets with multiple magnetic sublattices naturally host non-Abelian SU(N) gauge fields in magnon band structures, providing a robust rule-to-go mechanism. The noncommutativity of these gauge fields prevents Berry-curvature cancellation and guarantees a nonvanishing thermal Hall response. As a minimal realization, we demonstrate that a coplanar 120$^{\circ}$ antiferromagnet with Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions constitutes a canonical SU(3) platform for the magnon thermal Hall effect. We provide a table of so-far-known two-dimensional lattice geometries and variants of magnetic structures, along with the corresponding gauge fields, providing a unified guideline for identifying magnetic materials, including antiferromagnets and altermagnets, that host thermal Hall transport.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出反铁磁体中存在非阿贝尔SU(N)规范场，为磁子热霍尔效应提供了新的"可行规则"机制，突破了传统U(1)规范场因对称性抵消导致的"不可行规则"限制。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为反铁磁绝缘体不利于磁子热霍尔效应，因为铁磁体中基于U(1)规范场的机制在反铁磁体中常因对称性抵消而失效。需要寻找新的机制来在反铁磁体中实现稳定的热霍尔响应。
AI.method: 提出反铁磁体中多磁性子晶格自然产生非阿贝尔SU(N)规范场，其非对易性防止了贝里曲率抵消。以具有Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的120°共面反铁磁体作为最小实现，构建了规范的SU(3)平台。
AI.result: 证明了非阿贝尔规范场为磁子热霍尔效应提供了稳健的"可行规则"机制，保证非零热霍尔响应。提供了包含各种二维晶格几何和磁结构的表格，为识别包括反铁磁体和交替磁体在内的磁性材料提供了统一指南。
AI.conclusion: 反铁磁体通过非阿贝尔SU(N)规范场成为磁子热霍尔效应的有利平台，突破了传统U(1)机制的局限性，为磁性材料中热霍尔输运的识别和设计提供了新范式。

title: Rhythm as an ordered phase of sound: how musical meter emerges in a statistical mechanical model
summary: We develop a model of musical rhythm and meter based on optimizing the trade-off between human psychological preferences for perceiving repeated patterns in time with a desire for variety and complexity. By mapping these competing preferences onto analogous quantities in statistical physics, we define an effective free energy which is minimized in the grand canonical ensemble. Using a mean field approximation, we observe phase transitions in the model from disordered events in time to orderings that closely reproduce those seen in music. We then compare the range of rhythmic characteristics predicted by the model to a dataset drawn from compositions by Johann Sebastian Bach, finding generally good quantitative agreement. The results provide a new lens through which to study musical rhythm, and a method for generatively producing rhythms.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于统计物理学的音乐节奏和节拍模型，通过优化人类对重复模式感知与对多样性需求之间的平衡来生成节奏。
AI.motivation: 研究音乐节奏和节拍的形成机制，从人类心理偏好角度解释为什么某些节奏模式在音乐中普遍存在。作者希望建立一种理论框架，将音乐节奏的感知与统计物理学原理联系起来。
AI.method:
1. 将人类对时间重复模式的偏好与对多样性的需求映射到统计物理学中的类似量
2. 定义有效自由能，在巨正则系综中最小化
3. 使用平均场近似观察相变
4. 将模型预测的节奏特征与巴赫作品数据集进行比较验证
AI.result:
1. 模型观察到从无序时间事件到有序结构的相变，这些有序结构与音乐中观察到的节奏模式相似
2. 模型预测的节奏特征与巴赫作品数据集在数量上有良好的一致性
3. 模型能够生成类似音乐的节奏模式
AI.conclusion: 该模型为研究音乐节奏提供了新的理论视角，并提供了生成节奏的方法。通过统计物理学框架解释音乐节奏的形成，展示了人类心理偏好与物理原理之间的深刻联系。

title: d-Wave pair density wave superconductivity in a two-orbital model
summary: Motivated by exploring superconductivity in multi-orbital systems, we study two orbital models of spinful fermions representing ($p_x,p_y$) or ($d_{xz}, d_{yz})$ orbitals on the square lattice. For minimal interorbital $t$-$J$ or $t$-$V$ on-site interactions, a random phase approximation uncovers regimes of instability towards incommensurate $d_{xy}$ pair density wave ($d$-PDW) superconductivity with driven by interband pairing. We study the competition of PDW order with uniform nodal $d_{xy}$ pairing states and magnetic and charge density wave (CDW) instabilities. At strong coupling, we derive an effective hard-core Cooper pair Hamiltonian which we study using a bosonic Gutzwiller ansatz to reveal a period-$2$ PDW over a wide range of fillings as well as a checkerboard CDW at quarter-filling. Our results apply to correlated multi-orbital materials with quasi-1D bands, Hubbard models on the square-octagon lattice, and atomic fermions in $p$-orbitals. Our work highlights the role of the orbital content and multiband Fermi surfaces in stabilizing interband PDW states.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索多轨道系统中的超导性，发现通过最小轨道间相互作用，随机相位近似揭示了向非公度d-PDW超导的不稳定性，强耦合下得到周期2的PDW和棋盘CDW。
AI.motivation: 探索多轨道系统中的超导性，特别是研究(p_x,p_y)或(d_{xz},d_{yz})轨道在方晶格上的超导行为，理解轨道内容和多带费米面在稳定轨道间PDW态中的作用。
AI.method: 1. 使用两轨道模型研究自旋费米子；2. 采用最小轨道间t-J或t-V在位相互作用；3. 随机相位近似分析不稳定性；4. 强耦合下推导有效硬核Cooper对哈密顿量；5. 使用玻色Gutzwiller ansatz研究。
AI.result: 1. 发现向非公度d_{xy}对密度波(d-PDW)超导的不稳定性，由带间配对驱动；2. 揭示了PDW与均匀节点d_{xy}配对态、磁性和电荷密度波不稳定性之间的竞争；3. 强耦合下得到宽填充范围内的周期2 PDW和四分之一填充的棋盘CDW。
AI.conclusion: 该工作强调了轨道内容和多带费米面在稳定轨道间PDW态中的关键作用，研究结果适用于具有准一维能带的相关多轨道材料、方-八边形晶格上的Hubbard模型以及p轨道中的原子费米子。

title: Laterally Differentiated Polymorphs: a route to multifunctional nanostructures
summary: Multifunctional materials can exhibit emergent behavior from the coupling of two or more different properties. For example, coupling between magnetic and ferroelectric order enables electrical control of the magnetic state, enabling for example magnetoelectric memory or logic devices that combine the nonvolatility of magnetic order with the energy efficiency of voltage control. Magnetic iron garnets have outstanding magnonic and magnetooptical properties making them valuable in a range of technologies, but they have not been successfully incorporated into thin film two-phase magnetoelectric nanocomposites. Taking advantage of heterogeneously patterned substrates, this work demonstrates the engineering of garnet-perovskite composites in which both phases are polymorphs with the same composition but dramatically different structures and properties. Applying an electric field to the perovskite phase modulates the magnon dispersion and magnetooptical response of the garnet, opening a path to voltage-controlled garnet devices.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过在异质图案化基底上工程化石榴石-钙钛矿复合材料，实现了电场对石榴石相磁振子色散和磁光响应的调控，为电压控制石榴石器件开辟了新路径。
AI.motivation: 磁性铁石榴石具有优异的磁振子和磁光特性，但尚未成功集成到薄膜两相磁电纳米复合材料中。研究旨在将石榴石纳入磁电复合系统，实现电压控制功能。
AI.method: 利用异质图案化基底，工程化制备石榴石-钙钛矿复合材料，其中两相为相同化学成分但结构和性质迥异的多晶型。通过电场作用于钙钛矿相来调控石榴石相的性质。
AI.result: 成功实现了电场对石榴石相磁振子色散和磁光响应的调制，证明了电压控制石榴石器件的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了通过异质图案化基底工程化石榴石-钙钛矿复合材料的新方法，为开发电压控制石榴石磁电器件提供了有效途径。

title: Exploring the conventional and anomalous Josephson effects at arbitrary disorder strength in systems with spin-dependent fields
summary: We present a theory of the Josephson current in superconductor-normal metal-superconductor (SNS) junctions in the presence of generic spin-dependent fields, such as spin-orbit coupling (SOC), Zeeman fields, and altermagnetism. We consider systems with arbitrary disorder strength, going beyond the usual diffusive and ballistic approximations. Using the linearized quasiclassical Eilenberger equation, we derive a compact expression for the Josephson current, which is then applied to various situations of experimental interest. First, we investigate the evolution of the Josephson critical current in an applied magnetic field in the presence of Rashba and Dresselhaus SOC, and discuss how this dependence can be used to probe SOC in the junction. We then study the anomalous Josephson ($\varphi_0$) effect in systems with Rashba SOC and show that it remains robust over a wide range of disorder strength, and can even be enhanced by moderate disorder in sufficiently long junctions. Finally, we investigate the Josephson current in disordered junctions with altermagnets, and show how the $0$-$π$ transition in such systems is suppressed by disorder. Our results may be useful for describing experimental setups with high-mobility samples, which nevertheless always contain some amount of disorder, and where neither purely ballistic nor diffusive approximations are adequate.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个包含自旋轨道耦合、塞曼场和交变磁性等自旋相关场的超导体-正常金属-超导体结中约瑟夫森电流的理论，适用于任意无序强度，超越了传统的扩散和弹道近似。
AI.motivation: 实验中的高迁移率样品总是包含一定程度的无序，既不是纯粹的弹道系统也不是纯粹的扩散系统，需要发展一个适用于任意无序强度的理论来描述这些实验装置。
AI.method: 使用线性化的准经典Eilenberger方程推导出约瑟夫森电流的紧凑表达式，然后将其应用于各种实验相关的情况。
AI.result: 1) 在拉什巴和德雷塞尔豪斯自旋轨道耦合存在下，研究了外加磁场中约瑟夫森临界电流的演化；2) 展示了拉什巴自旋轨道耦合系统中的反常约瑟夫森效应在宽范围无序强度下保持稳健，在足够长的结中甚至可以被适度无序增强；3) 研究了含交变磁体的无序结中的约瑟夫森电流，展示了这类系统中的0-π转变如何被无序抑制。
AI.conclusion: 该理论可用于描述包含一定无序的高迁移率样品实验装置，填补了纯粹弹性和扩散近似之间的空白，为探测自旋轨道耦合和理解无序对约瑟夫森效应的影响提供了理论工具。

title: Direction-aware topological descriptors for Young's modulus prediction in porous materials
summary: Classical topological descriptors used in topological data analysis (TDA) are invariant under permutations of spatial axes and therefore cannot represent the loading direction, which is essential for modeling anisotropic mechanical response. Here, this limitation is addressed by introducing a \emph{direction-aware TDA framework} in which the compression axis is explicitly embedded into filtration functions used to compute both persistent homology and Euler characteristic profile descriptors. Across multiple porous-material datasets spanning a broad range of structural anisotropy, direction-aware descriptors yield higher predictive accuracy than their direction-agnostic counterparts, with performance gains that increase systematically with anisotropy. Notably, direction-aware descriptors remain competitive and often improve $R^2$ even for nominally isotropic ensembles, indicating sensitivity to mechanically relevant directional organization beyond bulk anisotropy measures. When used as inputs to gradient-boosted tree models, the proposed descriptors approach the accuracy of convolutional neural networks trained directly on voxelized structures while retaining a compact, transferable representation. The study considers multiple datasets spanning weak to strong anisotropy, enabling systematic validation of direction-aware topology across regimes. Overall, the results establish direction-aware TDA as a general route for linking porous structure to direction-dependent elastic properties and motivate its use in anisotropic materials modeling problems where a preferred direction naturally arises.

AI.tldr: 提出方向感知的拓扑数据分析框架，通过将压缩轴嵌入过滤函数，提升对多孔材料各向异性力学响应的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 经典拓扑描述符无法表示加载方向，而这对建模各向异性力学响应至关重要。需要解决这一限制以更好地关联多孔结构与方向相关的弹性特性。
AI.method: 引入方向感知TDA框架，将压缩轴显式嵌入用于计算持久同调和欧拉特征谱描述符的过滤函数中。使用梯度提升树模型进行预测。
AI.result: 方向感知描述符在各向异性多孔材料数据集中比方向无关描述符具有更高的预测精度，性能增益随各向异性程度增加而系统提升。即使在名义各向同性集合中也能保持竞争力并常改善R²。
AI.conclusion: 方向感知TDA为关联多孔结构与方向相关弹性特性提供了通用途径，激励其在具有自然优先方向的各向异性材料建模问题中的应用。

title: Exploring topological phases with extended Su-Schrieffer-Heeger models
comment: 25 pages, 16 Figures. Invited topical review for JPCM. Accepted version
summary: The Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) model describes a tight-binding one-dimensional (1D) lattice with alternating nearest-neighbor amplitudes. Despite its mathematically simple and physically intuitive structure, the SSH model is capable of supporting a 1D topological phase that is characterized by the presence of zero energy eigenstates (zero modes) localized at each end of the lattice. For this reason, many studies in the area of topological phases of matter often consider the SSH model as a subject for various extensions that give rise to more sophisticated topological phenomena. The purpose of this article is to review, in sufficient detail, existing approaches to extending the SSH model. This includes extensions by increasing the dimensionality of the lattice, enlarging the size of its unit cell, or adding extra terms that represent various physical effects. For each approach, some extended SSH models studied in relevant existing literature are discussed as case studies. Noteworthy properties of such models, which are of topological origin, are further comprehensively elaborated.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH)模型的扩展方法，包括增加晶格维度、扩大原胞尺寸、添加物理效应项等，并讨论了这些扩展模型中的拓扑性质。
AI.motivation: SSH模型虽然结构简单，但能支持一维拓扑相并具有零能本征态（零模）。许多拓扑物相研究将其作为基础进行扩展以产生更复杂的拓扑现象，本文旨在详细综述现有的SSH模型扩展方法。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统梳理三种主要扩展途径：1）增加晶格维度；2）扩大原胞尺寸；3）添加代表各种物理效应的额外项。对每种方法，讨论相关文献中的具体扩展SSH模型作为案例研究。
AI.result: 综述了多种SSH扩展模型，包括高维SSH模型、多带SSH模型、添加相互作用项的SSH模型等，并详细阐述了这些模型展现的拓扑起源的显著性质，如拓扑不变量、边界态、拓扑相变等。
AI.conclusion: SSH模型作为拓扑物相研究的基础模型，通过多种扩展途径可以产生丰富的拓扑现象。本文系统综述了现有扩展方法，为理解更复杂拓扑系统提供了框架，并展示了SSH模型在拓扑物相研究中的核心地位和扩展潜力。

title: Generative optimal transport via forward-backward HJB matching
summary: Controlling the evolution of a many-body stochastic system from a disordered reference state to a structured target ensemble, characterized empirically through samples, arises naturally in non-equilibrium statistical mechanics and stochastic control. The natural relaxation of such a system - driven by diffusion - runs from the structured target toward the disordered reference. The natural question is then: what is the minimum-work stochastic process that reverses this relaxation, given a pathwise cost functional combining spatial penalties and control effort? Computing this optimal process requires knowledge of trajectories that already sample the target ensemble - precisely the object one is trying to construct. We resolve this by establishing a time-reversal duality: the value function governing the hard backward dynamics satisfies an equivalent forward-in-time HJB equation, whose solution can be read off directly from the tractable forward relaxation trajectories. Via the Cole-Hopf transformation and its associated Feynman-Kac representation, this forward potential is computed as a path-space free energy averaged over these forward trajectories - the same relaxation paths that are easy to simulate - without any backward simulation or knowledge of the target beyond samples. The resulting framework provides a physically interpretable description of stochastic transport in terms of path-space free energy, risk-sensitive control, and spatial cost geometry. We illustrate the theory with numerical examples that visualize the learned value function and the induced controlled diffusions, demonstrating how spatial cost fields shape transport geometry analogously to Fermat's Principle in inhomogeneous media. Our results establish a unifying connection between stochastic optimal control, Schrödinger bridge theory, and non-equilibrium statistical mechanics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于时间反转对偶性的最优控制方法，利用易模拟的前向松弛轨迹计算反向最优传输，无需目标分布知识
AI.motivation: 解决从无序参考态到结构化目标分布的随机系统最优控制问题，传统方法需要已知目标分布轨迹，但实际中这正是需要构造的对象
AI.method: 建立时间反转对偶性：反向动力学的值函数满足等价的前向HJB方程，通过Cole-Hopf变换和Feynman-Kac表示，前向势能可计算为路径空间自由能对前向轨迹的平均
AI.result: 框架提供物理可解释的随机传输描述，连接路径空间自由能、风险敏感控制和空间成本几何，数值示例展示了学习值函数和诱导控制扩散
AI.conclusion: 建立了随机最优控制、薛定谔桥理论和非平衡统计力学之间的统一联系，空间成本场塑造传输几何类似于非均匀介质中的费马原理

title: Fortuitous Universality of Bose-Kondo Impurities
summary: We use the fuzzy-sphere approach to study the Bose-Kondo impurity problem, namely a spin-$S$ impurity coupled to the $(2+1)$-dimensional $O(3)$ Wilson-Fisher CFT (Heisenberg universality class). We demonstrate that for $S=1/2,1,3/2$ the impurity flows to a distinct stable interacting conformal defect for each $S$. Using large-scale exact diagonalization and density-matrix renormalization group methods, we observe integer-spaced defect spectrum consistent with defect conformal symmetry and compute several low-lying defect primary operators as well as the RG monotonic $g$-function. Our findings show that despite sharing the same symmetry and anomaly, Bose-Kondo impurities flow to distinct stable infrared conformal fixed points, which we refer to as \emph{fortuitous universality}. We expect this fortuitous universality to persist for all $S$, extending to $S\rightarrow\infty$, with each spin-$S$ impurity flowing to its own stable infrared conformal fixed point.

AI.tldr: 使用模糊球方法研究Bose-Kondo杂质问题，发现不同自旋S的杂质会流向不同的稳定红外共形固定点，称为"偶然普适性"。
AI.motivation: 研究自旋S杂质与(2+1)维O(3) Wilson-Fisher CFT（海森堡普适类）耦合的Bose-Kondo杂质问题，探索不同自旋值下的杂质行为。
AI.method: 采用模糊球方法，结合大规模精确对角化和密度矩阵重整化群方法，分析杂质谱和RG单调g函数。
AI.result: 对于S=1/2,1,3/2，杂质流向不同的稳定相互作用共形缺陷；观察到整数间距的缺陷谱，计算了低能缺陷主算符和g函数；发现尽管具有相同对称性和反常，不同自旋的杂质流向不同的红外固定点。
AI.conclusion: Bose-Kondo杂质表现出"偶然普适性"：不同自旋S的杂质流向各自独特的稳定红外共形固定点，这一现象预计对所有S值都成立，包括S→∞极限。

title: Impact of charge transition levels on grain boundary properties in acceptor doped oxide ceramics: A phase-field study
summary: Advanced doping strategies enable oxide ceramic functionalities by tailoring bulk defect chemistry and space-charge-layer (SCL) behavior at interfaces. Charge transition levels (CTLs), defined as the Fermi level at which a defect changes its stable charge state, play a central role. Their alignment governs bulk defect chemistry, while their bending within SCLs induces additional charge-state transitions. Incorporating CTLs is therefore essential for a consistent description of defect equilibria and SCL formation. In this work, we propose a defect-chemistry-consistent phase-field model explicitly coupled with CTLs to investigate their role in SCL evolution. The model includes multivalent oxygen vacancies, multivalent acceptor dopants, electrons, and holes. It is applied to Fe-doped SrTiO3 over wide ranges of oxygen partial pressure and temperature, capturing both symmetric SCLs at stationary grain boundaries and asymmetric SCLs during migration. Two distinct grain boundary types, slow and fast boundaries, emerge during migration, consistent with experimental observations. Simulations reveal that CTL-governed bulk defect chemistry, together with CTL-induced charge-state transitions within SCLs, critically determine SCL characteristics. Moreover, CTL-mediated hole transport is significantly faster than acceptor dopant diffusion, modulating solute drag and grain boundary kinetics. Finally, the model predicts grain boundary properties dependent on both thermal history and boundary type, with slow and fast boundaries exhibiting distinct behaviors. This framework links defect chemistry, Fermi level, CTLs, and grain boundary kinetics, providing new insights for designing oxide ceramics with tailored properties.

AI.tldr: 提出结合电荷跃迁能级的相场模型，研究Fe掺杂SrTiO3中空间电荷层演化与晶界动力学
AI.motivation: 电荷跃迁能级在缺陷化学和界面空间电荷层行为中起关键作用，但现有模型缺乏对其的显式耦合，需要建立缺陷化学一致的相场模型来研究其对空间电荷层演化的影响
AI.method: 提出缺陷化学一致的相场模型，显式耦合电荷跃迁能级，包含多价氧空位、多价受主掺杂剂、电子和空穴，应用于Fe掺杂SrTiO3体系
AI.result: 模型成功捕捉对称和不对称空间电荷层，识别出慢速和快速两种晶界类型，发现电荷跃迁能级调控的缺陷化学和电荷态转变决定空间电荷层特性，空穴传输比受主掺杂剂扩散快得多
AI.conclusion: 该框架连接了缺陷化学、费米能级、电荷跃迁能级和晶界动力学，为设计具有定制性能的氧化物陶瓷提供了新见解

title: Topological multicomponent-pairing superconductivity in twisted bilayer cuprates
summary: We investigate the emergence of a multicomponent superconducting state in twisted bilayer cuprates, characterized by the order parameter $s+d_1 e^{iφ_1}+d_2 e^{iφ_2}$, where $s=s_1+s_2$ denotes the symmetric combination of the layer-resolved $s$-wave components, and $s_i$ and $d_i$ ($i=1,2$) represent the $s$-wave and $d$-wave pairings associated with the individual layers. In particular, when $φ_1-φ_2\neq 0,π$, this three-component pairing state is topologically nontrivial. By combining Ginzburg--Landau analysis with self-consistent mean-field calculations based on a microscopic model, we show that such a topological three-component pairing state can be stabilized over a substantial parameter regime. Our results indicate that twisted bilayer cuprates can remain chiral and topological even in the presence of a sizable $s$-wave pairing component.

AI.tldr: 扭曲双层铜氧化物中出现了由s波和d波配对组合形成的三组分超导态，该态在特定相位条件下具有拓扑非平凡性。
AI.motivation: 研究扭曲双层铜氧化物中多组分超导态的出现，特别是探索在存在显著s波配对分量的情况下，系统是否能保持手性和拓扑特性。
AI.method: 结合金兹堡-朗道分析和基于微观模型的自洽平均场计算，研究三组分配对态（s+d₁e^{iφ₁}+d₂e^{iφ₂}）的稳定性。
AI.result: 这种拓扑三组分配对态可以在相当大的参数范围内稳定存在，表明扭曲双层铜氧化物即使在存在显著s波配对分量的情况下也能保持手性和拓扑特性。
AI.conclusion: 扭曲双层铜氧化物能够支持拓扑非平凡的多组分超导态，为探索新型拓扑超导材料提供了新的可能性。

title: SMC-AI: Scaling Monte Carlo Simulation to Four Trillion Atoms with AI Accelerators
summary: The rapid advancement of deep learning is reshaping the hardware design landscape toward AI tasks, posing fundamental challenges for HPC workloads such as atomistic simulation. Here we present SMC-AI, a general algorithmic framework that extends the SMC-X method for efficient canonical Monte Carlo simulation on AI accelerators, including GPUs and NPUs, while maintaining extreme scalability. The implementation of SMC-AI on an NPU cluster reaches unprecedented performance, achieving MC simulation of 4 trillion atoms on 4096 NPU dies. This represents the largest ML-accelerated atomistic simulation reported, delivering 32X system size and 1.3X throughput than previous records, with a relatively small computational budget. Excellent strong and weak scaling efficiency are reached for both the NPU and GPU implementation. By decoupling ML models from simulation, SMC-AI creates an abstraction that facilitates integration and porting of diverse ML models, laying a foundation for the future development of scalable scientific software.

AI.tldr: SMC-AI是一个通用算法框架，将SMC-X方法扩展到AI加速器（GPU/NPU）上进行高效正则蒙特卡洛模拟，在NPU集群上实现了4万亿原子模拟，创下最大ML加速原子模拟记录。
AI.motivation: 深度学习快速发展正在重塑面向AI任务的硬件设计格局，这给原子模拟等HPC工作负载带来了根本性挑战。需要开发能够在AI加速器上高效运行的算法框架。
AI.method: 提出SMC-AI框架，扩展SMC-X方法，使其能够在GPU和NPU等AI加速器上进行高效的正则蒙特卡洛模拟。通过将ML模型与模拟解耦，创建抽象层便于集成和移植不同的ML模型。
AI.result: 在NPU集群上实现了前所未有的性能：模拟4万亿原子（4096个NPU芯片），这是已报道的最大ML加速原子模拟，系统规模比之前记录大32倍，吞吐量高1.3倍，计算预算相对较小。NPU和GPU实现都达到了优异的强扩展和弱扩展效率。
AI.conclusion: SMC-AI通过解耦ML模型与模拟，创建了一个便于集成和移植不同ML模型的抽象层，为未来可扩展科学软件开发奠定了基础。

title: Mode-Resolved Multiband Ballistic Transport and Conductance Thresholds in Bilayer Graphene Junctions
comment: 14 pages, 8 figures. Comments are very welcome
summary: We study ballistic transport in bilayer graphene junctions and show how electrostatic gating, interlayer bias, and homogeneous strain provide complementary control over electron transmission. In the absence of strain, transport is governed by symmetry constraints that suppress transmission at specific incidence angles despite the availability of states. An interlayer bias lifts this suppression through mode mixing and opens a tunable transport gap. Within a full four-band description, we identify a distinct conductance threshold that marks the onset of propagation of the upper band inside the barrier. This produces a clear change in the slope of the conductance and serves as an experimentally accessible transport fingerprint of the multiband structure and interlayer coupling. Homogeneous in-plane strain acts as a geometric control mechanism. By reshaping the band structure in momentum space, it redistributes the angular transmission window and suppresses conductance without introducing disorder. Importantly, strain preserves the underlying symmetry-based decoupling responsible for transmission suppression while shifting its condition away from normal incidence. These results provide a unified framework for interpreting angle-resolved transport in bilayer graphene and establish multiband ballistic transport as a practical probe of band-structure geometry.

AI.tldr: 双层石墨烯结中的弹道输运研究，展示了静电门控、层间偏压和均匀应变如何提供对电子传输的互补控制，建立了多带弹道输运作为能带结构几何特性的实用探针。
AI.motivation: 研究双层石墨烯结中的弹道输运特性，探索如何通过多种物理机制（静电门控、层间偏压、均匀应变）实现对电子传输的互补控制，理解对称性约束对传输的影响，并建立多带弹道输运作为探测能带结构几何特性的实用工具。
AI.method: 采用完整的四带描述方法研究双层石墨烯结中的弹道输运，分析对称性约束对传输的影响，探讨层间偏压如何通过模式混合解除传输抑制，研究均匀面内应变作为几何控制机制如何重塑动量空间中的能带结构并重新分布角传输窗口。
AI.result: 发现无应变时传输受对称性约束抑制，层间偏压通过模式混合解除抑制并打开可调传输间隙，识别出标志上带在势垒内传播开始的独特电导阈值，均匀应变作为几何控制机制重新分布角传输窗口并抑制电导而不引入无序，同时保持对称性解耦。
AI.conclusion: 为解释双层石墨烯中的角分辨输运提供了统一框架，建立了多带弹道输运作为能带结构几何特性的实用探针，展示了静电门控、层间偏压和均匀应变的互补控制能力，为实验可访问的传输指纹提供了理论基础。

title: Stochastic Thermodynamics for Autoregressive Generative Models: A Non-Markovian Perspective
summary: Autoregressive generative models -- including Transformers, recurrent neural networks, classical Kalman filters, state space models, and Mamba -- all generate sequences by sampling each output from a deterministic summary of the past, producing genuinely non-Markovian observed processes. We develop a general theoretical framework based on stochastic thermodynamics for this class of architectures and introduce the entropy production, which can be efficiently estimated from sampled trajectories without exponential sampling cost despite the non-Markovian nature of the observed dynamics. As a proof-of-concept experiment for a large language model (LLM), we evaluate the token-level and sentence-level entropy production for a pre-trained Transformer-based model, GPT-2. We also demonstrate the framework in the linear Gaussian case, where the model reduces to the Kalman innovation representation and the entropy production admits an analytical expression. We further show that the entropy production decomposes exactly into non-negative per-step contributions in terms of retrospective inference, and each of those terms further splits into information-theoretically meaningful terms: a compression loss and a model mismatch. Our results establish a bridge between stochastic thermodynamics and modern generative models, and provide a starting point for quantifying irreversibility in a broad class of highly non-Markovian processes such as LLMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了一个基于随机热力学的理论框架，用于分析自回归生成模型（如Transformer、RNN、Mamba等）的不可逆性，并提出了熵产生量的计算方法，在GPT-2上进行了实验验证。
AI.motivation: 自回归生成模型（包括Transformer、RNN、Kalman滤波器、状态空间模型和Mamba）通过从过去信息的确定性摘要中采样来生成序列，产生真正非马尔可夫的观测过程。目前缺乏一个统一的理论框架来分析这类高度非马尔可夫过程的不可逆性，特别是在大型语言模型等现代生成模型中。
AI.method: 开发了一个基于随机热力学的通用理论框架，引入了熵产生量的概念，该量可以从采样轨迹中高效估计而无需指数采样成本。在GPT-2上进行了token级和句子级的熵产生量评估，并在线性高斯情况下进行了分析验证，此时模型简化为Kalman创新表示。
AI.result: 熵产生量可以精确分解为非负的每步贡献，每个贡献项进一步分解为信息理论上有意义的术语：压缩损失和模型失配。在线性高斯情况下，熵产生量有解析表达式。实验表明该框架可以量化GPT-2等大型语言模型的不可逆性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究在随机热力学和现代生成模型之间建立了桥梁，为量化LLMs等高度非马尔可夫过程的不可逆性提供了起点，为理解自回归生成模型的热力学性质提供了新视角。

title: Directional Criticality and Higher-Order Flatness: Designing Van Hove Singularities in Three Dimensions
summary: Van Hove singularities (VHSs) play a pivotal role in driving correlated electronic phenomena. Traditional classifications focus only on critical points where the band gradient vanishes in all directions. Here we establish a unified classification of VHSs in three-dimensional systems, characterized by the number of vanishing gradient components and Hessian eigenvalues: ordinary ($M$-type), higher-order ($T_1$, $T_2$, $T_3$), noncritical ordinary ($N_0$, $N_1$, $N_2$), and noncritical higher-order ($S_1$, $S_2$) types. Noncritical VHSs exhibit directional quenching: the gradient vanishes in a two-dimensional subspace while remaining finite along the orthogonal direction, yielding finite density-of-states enhancements with distinct energy dependencies. Using an $s$-orbital tight-binding model on the pyrochlore lattice with spin-orbit coupling, we demonstrate that all singularity classes emerge at distinct high-symmetry points through controlled tuning of the hopping ratio. This work establishes directional criticality and higher-order flatness as design principles for tailoring density-of-states enhancements in three-dimensional quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了三维系统中范霍夫奇点的统一分类体系，包括普通型、高阶型、非临界普通型和非临界高阶型，并通过自旋轨道耦合的烧绿石晶格模型展示了所有奇点类的实现。
AI.motivation: 传统范霍夫奇点分类仅关注所有方向梯度都为零的临界点，忽略了梯度在部分方向为零、其他方向非零的情况。本文旨在建立更全面的三维系统范霍夫奇点分类框架，揭示方向性临界性和高阶平坦性对态密度增强的调控作用。
AI.method: 基于梯度分量消失数量和Hessian矩阵特征值，提出统一分类体系：普通型（M型）、高阶型（T1、T2、T3）、非临界普通型（N0、N1、N2）和非临界高阶型（S1、S2）。使用带自旋轨道耦合的s轨道紧束缚模型，在烧绿石晶格上通过调控跳跃比实现所有奇点类。
AI.result: 建立了完整的范霍夫奇点分类体系，揭示了非临界范霍夫奇点具有方向性淬灭特性：梯度在二维子空间消失而在正交方向保持有限，产生具有不同能量依赖性的有限态密度增强。所有奇点类都能在不同高对称点通过调控跳跃比实现。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了三维系统中范霍夫奇点的统一分类框架，将方向性临界性和高阶平坦性确立为调控三维量子材料态密度增强的设计原则，为设计具有特定电子特性的材料提供了新思路。

title: Optomagnetic non-thermal modification of the ferromagnetic resonance
summary: We investigate the photoinduced shift of the ferromagnetic resonance (FMR) frequency in magnets caused by the inverse Cotton-Mouton effect (ICME) under linearly polarized light. Using a Lagrangian description of magnetization dynamics, we derive the equations of motion, and obtain analytical expressions for the resonance frequency in both in-plane and out-of-plane equilibrium configurations. The theory shows that the FMR frequency depends on the polarization angle and propagation direction of light, with ICME producing a frequency shift that can dominate over thermal effects. The analytical results agree well with numerical simulations and with available experimental data for bismuth-substituted yttrium iron garnet, enabling estimation of the ICME contribution. These findings demonstrate that linearly polarized light can be used to control ferromagnetic resonance through magneto-optical effects.

AI.tldr: 研究线性偏振光通过逆Cotton-Mouton效应引起的铁磁共振频率偏移，理论分析与实验数据吻合良好
AI.motivation: 探索线性偏振光通过磁光效应控制铁磁共振的可能性，特别是逆Cotton-Mouton效应（ICME）对铁磁共振频率的影响
AI.method: 使用磁化动力学的拉格朗日描述推导运动方程，获得面内和面外平衡配置下共振频率的解析表达式，并与数值模拟和实验数据对比
AI.result: 铁磁共振频率依赖于光的偏振角和传播方向，ICME产生的频率偏移可主导热效应，理论结果与铋取代钇铁石榴石的实验数据吻合良好
AI.conclusion: 线性偏振光可通过磁光效应有效控制铁磁共振，ICME贡献可被量化估计，为光控磁共振提供了理论基础

title: Three-Dimensional Electronic Structures in Superconducting Ruddlesden-Popper Bilayer Nickelate Films
summary: Beyond the quasi-two-dimensional (2D) paradigm of cuprates, the role of the third dimension of the Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer nickelates is essential to decoding their superconducting mechanism. Here, using angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) with varied photon energies, we systematically investigate the electronic band structures in three dimensions for superconducting (La,Pr,Sm)$_3$Ni$2$O$7$/SrLaAlO$4$ thin films (superconducting onset temperature $T_c^{\text{onset}} \sim 48$ K) transferred via a cryogenic ultra-high vacuum suitcase. We reveal an orbital-dependent dimensionality: while the $d{x^2-y^2}$-dominant bands exhibit a quasi-2D character, the $d{z^2}$-dominant band displays a finite $k_z$ dispersion. Finite energy gaps are identified on all observed bands across multiple high-symmetry directions. Systematic temperature-dependent analysis characterizes the superconducting nature of the gap on the $d{z^2}$-derived band, revealing a large gap $Δ\sim 18$ meV and a ratio $2Δ/k_BT_c\sim 8$ exceeding the weak-coupling BCS limit. The suppression of spectral weight near the Fermi level persists above the superconducting transition temperature. Ubiquitous waterfall-like spectral features evidence the presence of electron interactions. These results underscore the role of the $d_{z^2}$ orbital and correlations, placing constraints on theoretical models for nickelate superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 通过变光子能量ARPES研究La3Ni2O7薄膜的三维电子结构，发现轨道依赖的维度特性：dx²-y²带呈准二维特征，dz²带显示有限kz色散。在dz²带上观测到超导能隙Δ~18 meV，2Δ/kBTc~8超过BCS弱耦合极限，表明强关联作用。
AI.motivation: 理解镍酸盐超导机制需要超越准二维范式，研究三维电子结构。Ruddlesden-Popper双层镍酸盐中第三维度的作用对解码其超导机制至关重要。
AI.method: 使用变光子能量的角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)系统研究La3Ni2O7/SrLaAlO4薄膜的三维电子能带结构，通过低温超高真空转移样品，进行温度依赖分析。
AI.result: 发现轨道依赖的维度特性：dx²-y²主导带呈准二维特征，dz²主导带显示有限kz色散。在dz²带上观测到超导能隙Δ~18 meV，2Δ/kBTc~8超过BCS弱耦合极限。费米能级附近谱权重的抑制持续到超导转变温度以上，普遍存在瀑布状谱特征表明电子相互作用。
AI.conclusion: dz²轨道和关联效应在镍酸盐超导中起关键作用，这些结果为镍酸盐超导理论模型提供了约束，强调了三维电子结构的重要性。

title: Differentiable hybrid force fields support scalable autonomous electrolyte discovery
summary: Autonomous electrolyte discovery demands a computational engine that satisfies a critical trilemma: it must be fast enough for high-throughput screening, accurate enough for quantitative property prediction, and calibratable enough for online refinement. Classical empirical force fields (FFs) are fast but rely heavily on error cancellation, while standard machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) are computationally expensive, lack rigorous long-range physics, and resist gradient-based calibration. In this Perspective, we highlight that differentiable hybrid FFs resolve this trilemma by fusing physically motivated functional forms with neural-network short-range corrections. Grounded in Energy Decomposition Analysis (EDA), state-of-the-art models such as PhyNEO-Electrolyte and ByteFF-Pol achieve zero-shot generalization to bulk phases, delivering throughputs on the order of tens of ns/day (up to $\sim$50 ns/day, depending on model complexity) for 10,000-atom systems. Crucially, their physical skeletons provide a well-conditioned parameter space for differentiable molecular dynamics (dMD). This enables a dual-calibration paradigm: bottom-up \textit{ab initio} parameterization combined with top-down fine-tuning from macroscopic experimental observables. We propose that this architecture meets the requirements of a ``ChemRobot-ready'' digital twin by integrating physics-grounded simulation with experimentally calibratable refinement, thereby enabling closed-loop autonomous electrolyte discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出可微分混合力场解决电解质发现中的三难问题：快速高通量筛选、准确性质预测和可校准在线优化，通过物理骨架与神经网络短程修正融合实现
AI.motivation: 自主电解质发现需要满足三难问题的计算引擎：快速高通量筛选、准确性质预测和可校准在线优化。传统经验力场依赖误差抵消，标准机器学习势计算昂贵、缺乏严格长程物理且难以梯度校准
AI.method: 提出可微分混合力场，融合物理动机函数形式与神经网络短程修正。基于能量分解分析，如PhyNEO-Electrolyte和ByteFF-Pol模型，物理骨架提供良好条件参数空间用于可微分分子动力学，支持自下而上从头算参数化与自上而下实验可观测微调的双重校准范式
AI.result: 模型实现零样本泛化到体相，在10,000原子系统上达到约50 ns/天的吞吐量。物理骨架为可微分分子动力学提供良好条件参数空间，支持双重校准范式
AI.conclusion: 该架构满足"ChemRobot-ready"数字孪生要求，通过物理基础模拟与实验可校准优化的整合，实现闭环自主电解质发现

title: Phonon-driven decoherence of high-harmonic generation in the solid-state
summary: High-harmonic generation in solids has emerged as a powerful probe of ultrafast electron dynamics and lattice motion, and recent theoretical work has suggested that thermally driven lattice fluctuations can act as an effective source of decoherence in the harmonic-generation process. However, a direct experimental link between high-harmonic emission and temperature-driven incoherent phonons has remained unclear. Here, we investigate the temperature dependence of high-harmonic generation in ultrapure silicon using reflection-geometry measurements over a wide temperature range. We observe that the harmonic yield increases significantly with decreasing temperature. To interpret these results, we introduce a one-dimensional atomic-chain model in which finite temperature is represented by random lattice displacements that mimic incoherent phonon fluctuations. The simulations reproduce the magnitude of temperature-dependent change of the harmonic signal and support a picture in which thermally induced lattice disorder enhances electron-hole decoherence, thereby reducing high-harmonic emission. Our results establish incoherent phonons as an important source of decoherence in solid-state high-harmonic generation.

AI.tldr: 实验发现硅中高次谐波产率随温度降低而显著增加，通过一维原子链模型证明非相干声子引起的晶格无序增强电子-空穴退相干，从而抑制高次谐波发射。
AI.motivation: 虽然理论上认为热驱动的晶格涨落可作为高次谐波产生过程中的有效退相干源，但实验上高次谐波发射与温度驱动的非相干声子之间的直接联系尚不明确。
AI.method: 在超纯硅中采用反射几何测量，研究宽温度范围内高次谐波产生的温度依赖性；引入一维原子链模型，用随机晶格位移模拟非相干声子涨落来代表有限温度效应。
AI.result: 观察到谐波产率随温度降低而显著增加；模拟重现了谐波信号温度依赖性变化的幅度，支持热诱导晶格无序增强电子-空穴退相干从而减少高次谐波发射的图像。
AI.conclusion: 非相干声子是固态高次谐波产生中重要的退相干源，建立了高次谐波发射与温度驱动非相干声子之间的直接实验联系。

title: Machine Learning the order-disorder Jahn-Teller transition in LaMnO$_3$
summary: We investigate the Jahn-Teller structural phase transition in LaMnO$_3$ at $T_{JT} \simeq 750$ K using molecular dynamics simulations based on machine-learning force fields trained on ab initio data. Analysis of the site-site correlation function of the distortions reveals that the transition is driven by the ordering of the $Q_2$ Jahn-Teller distortion of the MnO$_6$ octahedra, which acts as the order parameter and establishes the order-disorder nature of the transition. Dynamical local distortions are found to persist above $T_{JT}$. Our results reproduce the experimental temperature dependence of both structural and phonon properties and highlight the presence of anharmonic effects at finite temperature. More broadly, the combined use of machine-learning molecular dynamics and velocity autocorrelation function analysis provides a robust framework for uncovering the microscopic mechanisms of structural phase transitions in correlated materials. In particular, this approach enables a clear distinction between order-disorder transitions and alternative mechanisms, such as displacive behavior, through the temperature evolution of vibrational properties.

AI.tldr: 使用机器学习分子动力学模拟研究LaMnO₃的Jahn-Teller相变，发现该相变是Q₂畸变有序化的有序-无序型转变，高温下存在动态局域畸变
AI.motivation: 研究LaMnO₃在约750K的Jahn-Teller结构相变，揭示其微观机制，区分有序-无序相变与位移型相变等不同机制
AI.method: 基于机器学习力场的分子动力学模拟，训练数据来自第一性原理计算，分析位点-位点关联函数和速度自相关函数
AI.result: 相变由MnO₆八面体的Q₂ Jahn-Teller畸变有序化驱动，该畸变作为序参量，证实了有序-无序相变性质；高温下存在动态局域畸变；结果再现了实验的结构和声子性质温度依赖性
AI.conclusion: 机器学习分子动力学与速度自相关函数分析相结合，为揭示关联材料结构相变的微观机制提供了稳健框架，能清晰区分有序-无序相变与位移型相变等不同机制

title: Fluctuation Mechanism of Single-Ion Anisotropy of Topological Insulator MnBi$_2$Te$_4$
summary: We demonstrate that charge fluctuations induced by electron hopping, combined with spin-orbit coupling, lift the sixfold degeneracy of the orbital singlet $^{6}S$ of Mn ions in the topological insulator MnBi$_2$Te$_4$, resulting in single-ion anisotropy. To solve the problem, a multiplet representation is introduced for the creation operators of atomic-state fermions in terms of the operators describing transitions between many-body wavefunctions. Using the operator form of perturbation theory up to the second order, we derive expressions for the populations $n_M$ of Mn ion states with spin projections $M$ of the $^{6}S$ term and determine the single ion anisotropy constants. The calculations reveal that the fluctuation mechanism ensures the possibility of implementing the easy-axis anisotropy observed in MnBi$_2$Te$_4$. Notably, the range of anisotropy constants $D_2$ obtained by varying the model parameters includes the value $D_2 = -0.0095$ meV, required to reproduce the critical field of the spin-flop transition $H_{\text{sf}}$, known from the experiment. The proposed mechanism has a wide range of applicability for describing the anisotropy in compounds where the ground state of a magnetic ion in a weak crystal field is described by an orbital singlet.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种新的单离子各向异性机制：电子跳跃引起的电荷涨落结合自旋轨道耦合，能够解除MnBi₂Te₄中Mn离子轨道单重态⁶S的六重简并，从而产生单离子各向异性。
AI.motivation: 研究MnBi₂Te₄等拓扑绝缘体中磁性离子的各向异性起源。传统晶体场理论无法解释轨道单重态⁶S的各向异性，需要探索新的物理机制。
AI.method: 引入多体波函数跃迁算符的多重态表示，建立原子态费米子的产生算符。采用二阶微扰理论，推导Mn离子⁶S项自旋投影M态占据数n_M的表达式，计算单离子各向异性常数。
AI.result: 涨落机制能够实现MnBi₂Te₄中观察到的易轴各向异性。通过调节模型参数得到的各向异性常数D₂范围包含了实验所需的D₂ = -0.0095 meV，该值能够重现实验中观测到的自旋翻转转变临界场H_sf。
AI.conclusion: 提出的涨落机制具有广泛适用性，可用于描述弱晶体场中磁性离子基态为轨道单重态的化合物的各向异性，为理解这类材料的磁性各向异性提供了新途径。

title: Strain continuously rotates the Néel vector in altermagnetic MnTe
summary: Altermagnetism has recently emerged as a distinct class of collinear antiferromagnets that break time-reversal symmetry, exhibiting a host of novel properties. Applied strain has attracted particular attention as a key tuning parameter for altermagnets. Although several experimental studies have demonstrated the preparation of single-domain states through a combination of applied strain and magnetic field, the route to such states remains unclear. Here, we use magneto-optical measurements on single crystals of MnTe under applied strain to show that, in contrast to previous reports, strain acts primarily to rotate the Néel vector L continuously. Since the orientation of L determines the magnetic point group symmetry, this continuous rotation effectively tunes the symmetry and its associated physical properties. Furthermore, we demonstrate that built-in strain in free-standing crystals is sufficient to pin L into continuous textures over millimeter length scales. Together, these results provide guidance for future device design and open the door to leveraging the Néel vector orientation as a tunable degree of freedom in spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 应变主要作用是连续旋转MnTe中的奈尔矢量，而非产生单畴态，这为利用奈尔矢量取向作为可调自由度提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 虽然应变被认为是调控交变磁体的关键参数，但实验显示应变与磁场结合可制备单畴态，其具体机制尚不明确。本研究旨在澄清应变对交变磁体MnTe中磁序的实际作用机制。
AI.method: 对MnTe单晶样品在施加应变条件下进行磁光测量，分析应变对奈尔矢量取向的影响。
AI.result: 应变主要作用是连续旋转奈尔矢量L，而非产生单畴态；自由晶体中的内建应变足以将L钉扎在毫米尺度的连续织构中；奈尔矢量取向决定了磁点群对称性，因此连续旋转可有效调控对称性及相关物理性质。
AI.conclusion: 应变通过连续旋转奈尔矢量来调控交变磁体的对称性和性质，为未来器件设计提供了指导，并开启了利用奈尔矢量取向作为自旋电子学应用中可调自由度的新途径。

title: Massive dynamics of skyrmions in ferrimagnetic films
summary: Deformations of skyrmions arising from the presence of more than one magnetic sublattice lead to their massive dynamics in ferrimagnets as compared to the massless dynamics in 2D ferromagnets. This results in the gyroscopic motion of skyrmions, which manifests as skyrmion cyclotron resonance that can be excited by microwaves or spin currents. We investigate analytically and numerically the motion and resonant oscillations of individual skyrmions and skyrmion lattices in the presence of dissipation in a two-sublattice transition-metal -- rare-earth (TM/RE) system. The focus is on the dependence of the skyrmion dynamics on the RE concentration. Parameters of the CoGd ferrimagnet are utilized in the numerical work. The massive dynamics of skyrmions in ferrimagnets, as well as the spectrum of their excitations, undergo significant changes near the angular momentum compensation point, which should not be difficult to detect in experiments.

AI.tldr: 研究铁磁体中斯格明子的动力学，特别是其质量特性、回旋共振以及在稀土浓度变化下的行为，重点关注角动量补偿点附近的显著变化。
AI.motivation: 斯格明子在铁磁体中的动力学与铁磁体不同，具有质量特性，这导致回旋共振现象。研究这种动力学在稀土浓度变化下的行为，特别是在角动量补偿点附近的变化，对于理解和实验检测这些现象至关重要。
AI.method: 采用解析和数值方法研究单个斯格明子和斯格明子晶格在耗散存在下的运动和共振振荡。使用CoGd铁磁体参数进行数值计算，重点关注稀土浓度对斯格明子动力学的影响。
AI.result: 斯格明子在铁磁体中的质量动力学及其激发谱在角动量补偿点附近发生显著变化。这些变化应该不难在实验中检测到，斯格明子回旋共振可以通过微波或自旋电流激发。
AI.conclusion: 铁磁体中斯格明子的质量动力学特性与铁磁体中的无质量动力学形成鲜明对比。稀土浓度变化，特别是在角动量补偿点附近，对斯格明子动力学有重要影响，这为实验检测提供了明确途径。

title: Controlling the rain fall statistics using Mean-Reverting Jump Diffusion model
summary: We present a stochastic mean-reverting jump-diffusion model to simulate rainfall time series and validate it using long-term half-hourly rain fall data from the North-East region of India. The model captures the intermittent and extreme-event dynamics of rainfall, reproducing superdiffusive behavior with an exponent $\sim 1.8$, along with the observed probability distributions and multifractal features. By systematically varying key parameters, we demonstrate a transition between Log-Normal and Gamma distributions, and show how the occurrence of extreme events and dry-patch durations can be controlled. Spectral and wavelet analyses further confirm that the simulated series reproduces the dominant temporal scales observed in real rainfall data. Our proposed framework provides a robust tool for generating realistic synthetic rainfall series and serves as an effective approach for understanding the influence of underlying stochastic processes that governs the rainfall statistics.

AI.tldr: 提出一个随机均值回归跳跃扩散模型来模拟降雨时间序列，并通过印度东北部长期半小时降雨数据进行验证，模型能捕捉降雨的间歇性和极端事件动态。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够准确模拟降雨时间序列的随机模型，特别是要捕捉降雨的间歇性、极端事件动态、超扩散行为以及多重分形特征，以生成现实的合成降雨序列并理解控制降雨统计的底层随机过程。
AI.method: 使用随机均值回归跳跃扩散模型，通过系统变化关键参数，结合谱分析和小波分析验证模型性能，并与印度东北部长期半小时降雨数据进行对比。
AI.result: 模型成功再现了超扩散行为（指数~1.8）、观测到的概率分布和多重分形特征，展示了在对数正态分布和伽马分布之间的转变，并能控制极端事件和干旱期持续时间，模拟序列再现了真实降雨数据中的主要时间尺度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为生成现实的合成降雨序列提供了稳健工具，并作为理解控制降雨统计的底层随机过程影响的有效方法。

title: Hubbard vs. Emery model: spectra, transport and relevance for cuprates
summary: Understanding the transport properties of cuprate superconductors is one of the central challenges in the physics of strongly correlated electrons. The most common approach is to define and solve a low-energy lattice model, but it is still unclear what the minimal model is to capture all relevant mechanisms and provide quantitative predictions. The main uncertainty concerns the choice of the orbital degrees of freedom to be included in the model, as well as the definition of the effective coupling. In this paper, we study the two most commonly considered models, namely the single-orbital Hubbard model and the three-orbital Emery model. We investigate and compare their spectral and transport properties, and find that the two models present a similar, but not the same, physical picture. We identify several strong quantitative differences which might allow one to discriminate between the two models by comparing theory with experiments. We compare our results for several physical quantities with 7 different experiments on 3 different La$_2$CuO$_4$-based cuprates, and in general find excellent agreement. The dc resistivity and the effective mass results suggest that the coupling constant in the effective Hubbard model is larger than expected. We find several more properties that are sensitive to the precise value of the coupling constant, including the critical doping for the Lifshitz transition, and the local spectral weight in the vicinity of the Fermi level; the latter provides a promising way to estimate the effective coupling constant in future photoemission experiments.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了铜酸盐超导体中两种常用模型（单轨道Hubbard模型和三轨道Emery模型）的光谱和输运性质，发现两者物理图像相似但存在定量差异，为实验区分模型提供了依据。
AI.motivation: 理解铜酸盐超导体的输运性质是强关联电子物理的核心挑战。目前尚不清楚什么是最小模型能够捕捉所有相关机制并提供定量预测，主要不确定性在于轨道自由度的选择和有效耦合的定义。
AI.method: 研究并比较了两种最常用模型：单轨道Hubbard模型和三轨道Emery模型。分析了它们的光谱和输运性质，并将理论结果与3种不同La₂CuO₄基铜酸盐的7个不同实验进行比较。
AI.result: 两种模型呈现相似但不完全相同的物理图像，存在多个强定量差异可用于区分模型。与实验比较发现极好的一致性，直流电阻率和有效质量结果表明有效Hubbard模型中的耦合常数比预期更大。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现了几种对耦合常数精确值敏感的性质，包括Lifshitz转变的临界掺杂和费米能级附近的局域光谱权重，后者为未来光电子实验估计有效耦合常数提供了有前景的方法。

title: Symmetry-guided and AI-accelerated design of intercalated transition metal dichalcogenides for antiferromagnetic spintronics
summary: The advancement of antiferromagnetic spintronics depends on quantum materials with target symmetry-dictated functionalities, however, their systematic discovery is hindered by the immense configurational complexity of the available material space. Here, we introduce a symmetry-guided, AI-accelerated framework incorporating graph neural networks with high generalization ability to overcome this bottleneck. Based on fully intercalated transition metal dichalcogenides (iTMDs) and using only 200 relaxed partially intercalated structures for transfer learning, our model effectively explores more than 100,000 partially intercalated configurations and identifies 35 altermagnetic and 20 $Tτ$-antiferromagnetic ground-state candidates. Interestingly, we show that tuning spin-group symmetry through intercalant arrangement or magnetic ordering realizes a series of d-wave altermagnets in these hexagonal systems with high spin-charge conversion efficiency. Furthermore, we reveal plentiful $Tτ$-antiferromagnets enabling efficient Néel spin-orbit torque switching, driven by giant $T$-odd spin Edelstein susceptibilities. These results establish iTMDs as a versatile platform for spintronics and provide a general strategy for the accelerated design of symmetry-enforced quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 提出基于对称性引导、AI加速的框架，利用图神经网络探索过渡金属二硫化物插层材料，发现多种反铁磁候选材料，为自旋电子学提供新平台。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁自旋电子学的发展受限于具有特定对称性功能材料的系统性发现，现有材料空间的巨大构型复杂性阻碍了这类量子材料的探索。
AI.method: 采用对称性引导、AI加速的框架，结合具有高泛化能力的图神经网络。基于完全插层的过渡金属二硫化物，仅使用200个部分插层结构的弛豫数据进行迁移学习，探索超过10万个部分插层构型。
AI.result: 识别出35个交变磁体和20个Tτ-反铁磁基态候选材料。通过调节插层排列或磁序，在六方晶系中实现了一系列具有高自旋-电荷转换效率的d波交变磁体。揭示了丰富的Tτ-反铁磁体，可通过巨大的T奇自旋Edelstein磁化率实现高效的Néel自旋轨道力矩切换。
AI.conclusion: 确立了插层过渡金属二硫化物作为自旋电子学的多功能平台，并为对称性增强量子材料的加速设计提供了通用策略。

title: Orbital-Selective $d$-wave Superconductivity in the Two-Band $t$-$J$ Model: Possible Applications to La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$
summary: We investigate superconductivity in a two-band $t$-$J$ model consisting of an itinerant orbital (orbital-0) and a quasi-localized orbital (orbital-1) using variational Monte Carlo. A robust orbital-selective $d$-wave superconducting state is found to emerge exclusively from the itinerant orbital. An analysis of the superexchange energy hierarchy shows that the quasi-localized orbital-1 competes with superconductivity by favoring local inter-orbital bound states, which act as energy defects and disrupt phase coherence. Consistently, the superconducting order parameter is monotonically suppressed as the occupancy of orbital-1 increases. Motivated by superconductivity in nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, these results highlight the essential role of multi-orbital physics beyond the single-band $t$-$J$ framework and point to a concrete route to enhance $T_c$: suppressing the involvement of localized $d_{z^2}$-derived orbitals.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过变分蒙特卡洛方法发现，在双轨道t-J模型中，只有巡游轨道能产生稳健的轨道选择性d波超导态，而准局域轨道通过形成局域轨道间束缚态与超导竞争，抑制超导序参量。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于理解镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇中的超导现象，探索超越单带t-J模型的多轨道物理机制，特别是不同轨道特性对超导的影响。
AI.method: 采用变分蒙特卡洛方法研究双轨道t-J模型，该模型包含一个巡游轨道（轨道-0）和一个准局域轨道（轨道-1）。
AI.result: 发现稳健的轨道选择性d波超导态仅从巡游轨道中产生；准局域轨道通过形成局域轨道间束缚态与超导竞争，破坏相位相干性；超导序参量随轨道-1占据数的增加而单调抑制。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了超越单带t-J框架的多轨道物理的关键作用，并指出了一条提高Tc的具体途径：抑制局域化d_{z^2}衍生轨道的参与。

title: Multiscale morphology and contact mechanics of physisorbed Al and Cu nanoparticles
summary: Using large-scale molecular dynamics simulations, we investigate the scaling of morphological and contact mechanics properties of Al and Cu nanoparticles (NPs) physisorbed on suspended graphene. The characteristic linear size of a NP ranges from 1 nm to 49 nm, covering a length scale of 1.5 decades. The NPs were obtained using a procedure mimicking thermal dewetting of thin films. Calculations show that NPs with a surface area-to-volume ratio above about 1.8 nm$^{-1}$, or with a linear size under 3-6 nm, behave differently from larger particles. For these smaller NPs, scaling of their total surface area and volume with the linear size can deviate from quadratic and cubic dependencies, respectively. Their mean interfacial separation and relative contact area change rapidly with size, exhibiting substantial variation. In contrast, for larger NPs, these quantities approach the thermodynamic limit. The height distributions of all particles exhibit a narrow spike and a decaying tail, both of which can be fit to Gaussians for larger NPs. In contrast, the interfacial gap distributions are close to a single Gaussian. The height power spectrum density (PSD) heatmaps of the smaller NPs are smeared and do not manifest a clear structure in contrast to the sixfold symmetry of the PSD of the larger ones. The maximum spatial frequency of the hexagonal 2D PSD roughly corresponds to the nearest-neighbor atomic distance of Al and Cu. For larger NPs with diameters of 20-25 nm, the isotropic height PSD exhibits power-law regions, which can be interpreted as self-affine roughness with Hurst exponents of 0.1-0.56. We also calculate the relative difference between the apparent contact area and the approximated area of the bottom atomic layer. Our simulations illustrate how surface topography evolves with NP size and suggest that larger NPs can have random surface roughness.

AI.tldr: 通过大规模分子动力学模拟研究铝和铜纳米颗粒在悬浮石墨烯上的形态和接触力学性质随尺寸的标度关系，发现小于3-6 nm的纳米颗粒与较大颗粒行为显著不同。
AI.motivation: 研究纳米颗粒在石墨烯上的吸附行为随尺寸变化的标度关系，特别是小尺寸纳米颗粒与热力学极限行为的差异，这对于理解纳米尺度接触力学和表面粗糙度演化具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用大规模分子动力学模拟，模拟热去湿法制备的铝和铜纳米颗粒（尺寸范围1-49 nm），分析其形态、接触面积、界面分离、高度分布和功率谱密度等性质。
AI.result: 发现表面体积比大于1.8 nm⁻¹或尺寸小于3-6 nm的纳米颗粒行为异常：表面面积和体积的标度关系偏离二次和三次依赖，界面分离和接触面积变化剧烈；较大颗粒接近热力学极限，高度分布呈高斯分布，功率谱密度显示六重对称性和自仿射粗糙度。
AI.conclusion: 纳米颗粒的表面形貌随尺寸显著演化，小颗粒行为偏离经典标度关系，而较大颗粒表现出随机表面粗糙度特征，这为纳米尺度接触力学和表面工程提供了重要见解。

title: Harmonic morphisms and dynamical invariants in network renormalization
summary: Renormalization of complex networks requires principled criteria for assessing whether a coarse-graining preserves dynamical content. We prove that discrete harmonic morphisms -- surjective maps preserving harmonic functions -- provide the minimal condition under which random walks on a fine-grained network project exactly onto random walks on its coarse-grained image, through an appropriate random time change. We formalize this via the harmonic degree, a diagnostic quantifying how closely any network coarse-graining approximates a harmonic morphism. Applying this framework to geometric, Laplacian, and GNN-based renormalization across real-world networks, we find that each method produces a distinct dynamical fingerprint encoding its underlying physical assumptions. Most strikingly, Laplacian renormalization spontaneously yields exact harmonic morphisms in several networks, achieving exact preservation of first-exit random-walk transition structure at specific scales, a property that entropic susceptibility fails to detect. Our results identify a discrete analog of diffusion-preserving conformal maps for irregular network topologies and provide quantitative tools for designing and evaluating multi-scale network descriptions.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了离散调和态射是网络粗粒化的最小条件，确保随机行走在适当时间变换下精确投影，并提出了调和度诊断工具来评估粗粒化质量。
AI.motivation: 网络重正化需要评估粗粒化是否保留动力学内容的原则性标准。目前缺乏能够确保随机行走动力学精确投影的数学框架。
AI.method: 证明离散调和态射（保持调和函数的满射）是随机行走精确投影的最小条件，引入调和度诊断量化粗粒化近似程度，应用于几何、拉普拉斯和GNN基重正化方法。
AI.result: 发现不同重正化方法产生独特的动力学指纹，拉普拉斯重正化在多个网络中自发产生精确调和态射，在特定尺度上精确保持首次退出随机行走转移结构。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为不规则网络拓扑提供了扩散保持共形映射的离散类比，为设计和评估多尺度网络描述提供了定量工具。

title: Co-operating multiorbital and nonlocal correlations in bilayer nickelate
summary: The interplay of multiorbital physics and nonlocal self-energy effects is studied within an effective three-orbital model for the high-pressure normal state of superconducting bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$. The model is solved within an advanced many-body framework capturing $k$-dependent correlations beyond dynamical mean-field theory. Different low-energy scenarios subtly depend on the strength of the interorbital interaction, either placing the notorious flat $γ$ quasiparticle band in the occupied part of the spectrum, or letting it cross the Fermi level. In the latter case, intriguing spin-polaron formation due to the scattering of electrons with paramagnon excitations takes place. This leads to bound states appearing as a shadow band with incoherent low-energy spectral weight below the Fermi level. Our results uncover additional competing states that exist in bilayer nickelates and could explain the controversy of recent angle-resolved photoemission experiments.

AI.tldr: 研究高压下双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇正常态中多轨道物理与非局域自能效应的相互作用，揭示不同低能场景取决于轨道间相互作用强度，发现自旋极化子形成导致费米能级下出现阴影带。
AI.motivation: 为了解决近期角分辨光电子能谱实验中的争议，探索双层镍酸盐中存在的额外竞争态，理解多轨道物理与非局域自能效应在高压正常态中的相互作用。
AI.method: 使用有效三轨道模型描述高压下双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇的正常态，采用超越动力学平均场理论的先进多体框架求解模型，捕捉k依赖的相关效应。
AI.result: 发现低能场景微妙依赖于轨道间相互作用强度：强相互作用时平坦γ准粒子带位于占据谱中，弱相互作用时该带穿过费米能级。后者情况下，电子与顺磁子激发散射导致自旋极化子形成，产生作为阴影带的束缚态，在费米能级下具有非相干低能谱权重。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了双层镍酸盐中存在的额外竞争态，这些态可以解释近期角分辨光电子能谱实验的争议，为理解该材料系统的复杂多体物理提供了新视角。

title: Alkaline-Earth Rare-Earth Fluoride Nanoparticle Superlattices for Ultrafast, Radiation Stable Scintillators
summary: Radioluminescent nanostructures provide a pathway to the fabrication of next-generation scintillators with tunability in composition, size, and morphology, and spectral and temporal properties, as well as scalable processing. Here we create a 3D millimeter-scale solid-state scintillators from SrLuF Ce3+, Pr3+ (SrLuF) core-shell nanostructures, integrating nanoscale building blocks into self-assembled macroscopic crystals. These scintillators exhibit single-digit nanosecond decay times, linear response, resistance to radiation-induced degradation, and optical emission yields within an order of magnitude of YAG Ce3+. We select a SrLuF host lattice owing to its high effective atomic number, wide band gap, and low phonon energy, which together support efficient 4f-5d radiative transitions from Ce3+ and Pr3+ activators while suppressing afterglow. We create a library of core-shell nanoscintillators with undoped SrLuF shells and cores spanning compositions from undoped SrLuF to fully doped SrCeF or SrPrF. Time-resolved and steady-state X-ray excited optical luminescence (XEOL) reveal broadband emission at 310 nm (Ce3+) and 335 nm (Pr3+) with biexponential decays in the sub-nanosecond (100-500 ps) and sub-15 ns (4-13 ns) regimes, demonstrating tunable radiative efficiency and ultrafast dynamics. Ensemble performance of the mm-scale superlattices is characterized under both continuous-wave and femtosecond high-intensity excitation, revealing high light yield, linear response, and radiation hardness under extreme irradiation of ultrafast 50fs X-ray pulses up to 5mJ per mm2 corresponding to a peak intensity of 1013 W per cm2. Together, these results establish a design framework for stable, bright, and tunable scintillation platforms with applications in precision health, space exploration and hard X-ray imaging at next-generation free-electron laser facilities.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了基于SrLuF:Ce3+,Pr3+核壳纳米结构的毫米级固态闪烁体，具有纳秒级衰减时间、线性响应、抗辐射降解和高光产额等优异性能。
AI.motivation: 开发下一代可调谐闪烁体，通过纳米结构设计实现成分、尺寸、形态、光谱和时间特性的可控调节，满足精密医疗、太空探索和下一代自由电子激光设施等应用需求。
AI.method: 采用SrLuF作为基质材料，利用其高有效原子序数、宽带隙和低声子能量特性，制备了从非掺杂SrLuF到完全掺杂SrCeF或SrPrF的核壳纳米闪烁体库，并通过自组装形成毫米级超晶格结构。
AI.result: 闪烁体表现出单数字纳秒衰减时间、线性响应、抗辐射降解性能，光产额接近YAG:Ce3+。在310nm(Ce3+)和335nm(Pr3+)处观察到宽带发射，具有亚纳秒(100-500ps)和亚15纳秒(4-13ns)的双指数衰减动力学，在极端辐射条件下(50fs X射线脉冲，峰值强度1013W/cm2)仍保持高光产额和线性响应。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了一个稳定、明亮、可调谐的闪烁体设计框架，为精密医疗、太空探索和下一代自由电子激光设施的硬X射线成像应用提供了有前景的平台。
